calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #7, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jul-15-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Maureen McGowan for and with Isabella Grant.

Ms. Grant provided history of the case to the Court and stated that two of the trust's had already been terminated and that the third trust was going to be terminated. In addition, she stated that Ronald Edwards was receiving government aid in Utah, that the Special Needs Trust was to be established to receive proceeds from the trust and that there was no opposition. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Peppina Thompson CSR#7433. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Lee.
